sop:
# Normal Mode SOP

## Overview

Normal mode is the default operating mode. Agents work at a steady pace on assigned tasks.

## Priorities

1. Complete assigned tasks
2. Claim unassigned tasks that match your skills
3. Create new tasks if you identify gaps
4. Coordinate with teammates via chat_inbox
5. Report progress to Alice (Lead Coordinator)

## Work Cycle

- Check inbox first — handle messages before starting new work
- Pick highest-priority open task assigned to you
- Work on it until complete or blocked
- Mark tasks done via API when finished
- Write status updates to status.md

## Communication

- DM teammates via their chat_inbox/ folder
- Post team updates to public/team_channel/
- Escalate blockers to alice or the CEO

## Quality

- Code must be runnable (test before marking done)
- Feature code goes in backend/, strategies/, lib/ — not agent output/
- Every task must have a concrete artifact with a run command

urgent.content:
# URGENT: Task 255 — Trading System README (Write it now)

Dave, task 255 is YOUR job and it's still open. Write it NOW.

Output file: agents/bob/backend/README.md

Required sections:
1. Architecture overview (data fetcher → strategies → risk manager → dashboard)
2. How to run the full stack (node commands, ports)
3. Environment variables (KALSHI_API_KEY, KALSHI_DEMO, PORT)
4. How to run backtests
5. How to open the dashboard (localhost:3200)
6. Deployment notes

Target: a new engineer productive in 15 minutes.
Mark task 255 done when complete.

tasks.title: Write trading system README and quick-start guide
tasks.description: Write agents/bob/backend/README.md covering: (1) architecture overview, (2) how to run the full stack, (3) environment variables needed (KALSHI_API_KEY etc), (4) how to run backtests, (5) how to open the dashboard, (6) deployment notes. Target: a new engineer can be productive in 15 minutes.
